Idioma.MSG_EstaBienFormadaYPuedeSerCreadaSinpro: the structure is correct and can be created
Idioma.MSG_NoSecumplenReglasOHayaValoresNoPerte: Except that required budget account and it does not complies the rules or there are values ​​belonging to an office
Idioma.MSG_PeroNoSeValidaronReglasNiValoresPert: No validated rules or securities belonging to an office
